name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-51
title: Spec Inv 31 claims test-green → spec-update transition that tdd-step.py state machine does not implement
description:
Wave 3 BUG-19 fix (PR #125) landed a spec invariant (Inv 31) claiming the forward state-machine chain is test-green → spec-update. The actual tdd-step.py implementation transitions test-green → deprecated. The prompt-shape fix is in place and tests pass, but Inv 31's transition claim is inconsistent with the state machine.

Decision needed: either (a) extend tdd-step.py with a spec-update state and the test-green → spec-update transition (matching the prompt and Inv 31 — most invasive), or (b) rewrite Inv 31 and the prompt to use whatever actual mechanism the state machine provides for re-entering a cycle from test-green (e.g., use --force, or add an explicit reset command). Option (b) is less invasive but requires picking a real cycle re-entry mechanism.

history.note: Wave 4: auto_close uses item-status.py; state machine accepts test-green → spec-update for cycle restart.
